action_set_definitions.name: get_filing_id_by_nda
action_set_definitions.description: Searches for a specific regulatory filing using the NDA number and Sequence number to retrieve its unique filing_id.

action_set_definitions.name: get_filing_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the full current state of a filing, including status, uploaded documents, and validation results.

filing_id.description: The unique tracking identifier for the filing.

action_set_definitions.name: get_historical_document_id
action_set_definitions.description: Searches previous sequences within the same NDA to find the ID of a specific document for lifecycle linking.

document_name.description: The name or type of the document to locate.

action_set_definitions.name: upload_and_link_document
action_set_definitions.description: Uploads a new document and establishes its eCTD lifecycle relationship (e.g., New, Replace, Delete) with a historical record.

document_type.description: Category of the document (e.g., 'Drug Substance Stability Report').

lifecycle_operator.description: The eCTD operation relative to the existing record.

related_document_id.description: The ID of the document in a previous sequence being acted upon.

action_set_definitions.name: validate_trc_compliance
action_set_definitions.description: Triggers an internal Technical Rejection Criteria (TRC) check for PDF standards and XML integrity.

action_set_definitions.name: remediate_submission_error
action_set_definitions.description: Applies specific technical fixes to a submission to resolve TRC or validation failures.

error_code.description: The specific error code returned by the validation tool.

action_set_definitions.name: transmit_to_esg
action_set_definitions.description: Sends the finalized sequence to the Electronic Submission Gateway (ESG).

action_set_definitions.name: check_gateway_status
action_set_definitions.description: Polls the ESG for the latest status of a transmitted submission.

transmission_id.description: The transmission ID returned during the transmit step.

state_description.filing_id: Unique tracking identifier for the current regulatory submission.
state_description.status: The current lifecycle phase of the filing (e.g., DRAFT, PENDING_VALIDATION, AWAITING_PAYMENT, SUBMITTED).
state_description.form_data: A collection of key-value pairs representing the data entered into the filing forms.
state_description.uploaded_documents: A list of metadata objects for files successfully uploaded to the system.
state_description.payment_status: The status of the mandatory filing fee (e.g., UNPAID, PROCESSING, COMPLETED).
state_description.validation_results: Internal flags indicating if compliance and data integrity checks have passed.
